overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian city on a sunny day. The character moves from an open plaza past a decorated ceremonial gate, through residential streets with palm trees, and finally approaches a massive temple complex with towering stone columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with ankh column and market stalls

agents.ego_description: Bayek walking steadily through the sunlit plaza toward a decorated gate, passing a large column with an ankh symbol

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone column with blue ankh hieroglyph painted on it
cluster of tall palm trees framing the plaza
traditional mud brick structures with orange and white painted stripes
wooden wheeled cart parked against the wall
ornate stone gateway with green trim and Eye of Horus symbols

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide sunlit plaza with a prominent stone column bearing an ankh symbol. Bayek walks forward on stone pavement toward a decorated ceremonial gate in the distance, with palm trees and mud brick buildings visible around the square.

events.description: passing through the decorated stone gate into the residential district

agents.ego_description: Bayek walking through the archway of the decorated gate, transitioning from the open plaza to a narrower street

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking toward the camera

entered.detail: stone wall with crenellations and decorative patterns
two-story residential structures with wooden balconies
colorful fabric banners strung across the street
green bushes with red flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: Bayek passes through the decorated stone gate into a residential area. The space becomes slightly more enclosed with stone walls and residential buildings featuring balconies. Hanging banners stretch overhead while flowering bushes line the stone path.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with balconies and palm trees

events.description: horse with rider passes by from right to left in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: Bayek walking along the residential street, passing pedestrians and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: horse with rider passing by from right to left
woman in teal dress walking past the camera

entered.detail: large residential building with multiple balconies and red awnings
ancient temple structures visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a residential street lined with two-story buildings featuring balconies and red awnings. Palm trees and flowering bushes provide shade while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. A horse with rider passes by, and ancient temple structures become visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple complex with massive stone gateway

events.description: entering the temple precinct with massive stone columns and ruins
child runs past from right to left crossing the path

agents.ego_description: Bayek approaching and walking through the massive temple gateway, observing the ancient architecture

notable_agents.action: child running across the path from right to left

entered.detail: enormous ancient stone gateway with thick columns and lintel
tall stone obelisk standing in the temple courtyard
ancient weathered stone walls and temple structures
giant cylindrical stone columns supporting the gateway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast temple complex with massive stone gateways and towering columns. Bayek walks toward and through the enormous stone archway, with an obelisk visible in the courtyard beyond. The residential buildings give way to ancient ruins and desert mountains appear in the far background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Egyptian city that transitions from an open public plaza into a dense residential district and finally opens into a monumental temple complex. It begins in a wide square beside a stone column bearing an ankh symbol, moving across the pavement toward a decorated ceremonial gate. As the camera passes through the gate, the environment becomes more enclosed, shifting into a residential area characterized by stone walls, hanging banners, and flowering bushes. The scene then flows through a street lined with two-story buildings and red awnings, passing pedestrians and a rider on horseback as massive temple structures emerge in the distance. Finally, the residential surroundings give way to a vast complex of towering columns and stone gateways, leading the camera through an enormous archway toward a distant obelisk and desert mountains.
